label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: AARONSMAN Thymen won from 29-rider breakaway on Sierra Nevada queen stage while ROGLIC attacked with 7km remaining, taking 15 seconds from EVENEPOEL.
tactical_patterns: AG2R Citroën drove chase to protect O'CONNOR's GC, revealing unwillingness to let multi-threat breaks survive unchallenged.
CRADDOCK Lawson bridged alone from initial break, suggesting original 29-man group contained too many GC threats for comfort.
ROGLIC attacked under 7km when EVENEPOEL had only VERMAERKE for support, revealing deliberate teammate attrition strategy by Jumbo.

rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: abandoned early after crash on category 3 climb at 35km, suggesting continued poor form
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: attacked GC favorites group before final 7km, finished with MAAS ahead of GC contenders
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: struggled on final climb despite CARAPAZ dropping back to pace, lost a GC place
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: caught out of position entering final climb, relegated to retrieval mode with ALMEIDA
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: sacrificed own result by dropping back to pace RODRIGUEZ, also assisted AYUSO and ALMEIDA
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: followed ROGLIC's late attack, finished on same time as stage winner group
